morning_thesis:
VIX 16.16 (MID regime) — bull filter eligible (<17.20), bear filter NOT eligible (<17.30 threshold). This is a BULL-ONLY day from a filter perspective. Premarket showed strong early buying (756.72 → 758.22) then orderly pullback to 757.03 — net slightly above prior close 756.56. Key battleground is the 758.08/758.22 resistance cluster. PRIMARY RISK: ISM Manufacturing PMI at 10:00 ET creates a mandatory no-trade window 09:55-10:20 ET. Pre-ISM no-trade bias. After ISM clears, watch for BULLISH_RECLAIM if SPY holds above 757.42 ribbon support — BULL setups eligible, BEAR setups blocked by VIX filter. Setup required before any entry per Rule 1.

Falsifiable predictions:
0. SPY sustains above 757.42 on first 5m bar after ISM (10:20-10:30 ET), signaling bull continuation toward 758.08 | window: 10:20-10:30 ET | invalidation: first 5m bar after 10:20 closes below 757.00 | confidence: 0.55
1. 758.08-758.22 cluster acts as resistance on first RTH test — no 5m bar closes above 758.30 before 11:00 ET | window: 09:35-11:00 ET | invalidation: 5m close above 758.30 with vol >=1.2x avg before 11:00 ET | confidence: 0.60
2. VIX stays below 17.20 all RTH session — bull filter remains eligible, no bear setups fire today | window: 09:30-15:50 ET | invalidation: VIX >17.20 rising | confidence: 0.72
3. Gap fill (756.56) is NOT tested today — SPY holds above 756.76 throughout RTH session | window: 09:30-15:50 ET | invalidation: any 5m bar closes below 756.56 | confidence: 0.58

predictions.claim: SPY sustains above 757.42 on first 5m bar after ISM (10:20-10:30 ET), signaling bull continuation toward 758.08
predictions.invalidation: First 5m bar after 10:20 ET closes below 757.00
predictions.actual: First post-ISM fire at 10:33 ET: SPY 757.73, ribbon BULL 46c — above 757.42. Bull continuation materialized to session high 760.4.

predictions.claim: 758.08-758.22 cluster acts as resistance on first RTH test — no 5m bar closes above 758.30 before 11:00 ET
predictions.invalidation: A 5m bar closes above 758.30 with volume >= 1.2x 20-bar avg before 11:00 ET
predictions.actual: SPY broke above 758.30 between 10:33 ET (757.73) and 11:00 ET (759.72) — obscured by tick timeout at 10:48-10:51. Post-ISM momentum blasted through cluster rather than rejecting.

predictions.claim: VIX stays below 17.20 all RTH session — bull filter remains eligible, no bear setups fire today
predictions.invalidation: VIX reads above 17.20 with rising direction at any point 09:30-15:50 ET
predictions.actual: VIX ranged 15.96-16.19 all session (falling direction). Bull filter eligible all day; bear filter blocked all day. No bear setups fired.

predictions.claim: Gap fill (756.56) is NOT tested today — SPY holds above 756.76 throughout RTH session
predictions.invalidation: Any 5m bar closes below 756.56 during RTH
predictions.actual: Morning low was 757.31 (09:48 ET) — $0.75 above 756.76. Gap-fill level untested; no bear pressure materialized.

surprises: Double tick timeout (10:48-10:51 and 11:03-11:06 ET, 220s wall-clock) coincided with peak post-ISM rally — engine was blind during the highest-velocity bars of the session
BULL 11/11 scored twice (11:54, 12:18 ET) but Gate A blocked both on ribbon momentum compression — confirms Gate A is the binding constraint in low-volatility afternoon chop
Post-ISM breakout through 758.22 resistance happened inside the 10:20-10:33 window where ISM-lockout was still partially active — catalyst moves don't wait for the gate to open
lesson: Post-macro-window breakouts happen in the immediate first bar after the lockout expires; if the ribbon has already flipped BULL inside the window and price is above the key level, the trigger is the window expiry itself — flag for J's weekend review as a potential 'first-bar-post-macro' entry exception.
tomorrow_hint: TOMORROW — PDH flip 760.4 is key: reclaim = bull extension to new highs, reject = range consolidation. Support cluster at 758.08-758.22 newly flipped.
